title: SPED Financial Assistance Scheme (FAS)
text:
SPED Financial Assistance Scheme (FAS) - SupportGoWhere
SPED Financial Assistance Scheme (FAS)
Share link
Provides financial assistance to lower-income families with children who are in MOE-funded Special Education Schools.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Full waiver of school fees and free textbooks and school attire
Subsidies for school meals and public transport
Collapse all sections
About this support

Full waiver of school fees

Free textbooks and school attire

$21 transport credit per month for students who take public transport

Meal subsidy of school meals:

7 meals per school week for students 7 to 12 years old

10 meals per school week for students 13 to 21 years old

Who is this for?

Singaporean students studying in MOE-funded Special Education Schools

Average Gross Household Income of up to $4,000, or Average Per Capita Income of up to $1,000.

How to apply?

Apply online through this link.

Where can I find help?

View more details

MOE Hotline: 6872 2220

Submit an enquiry

Customer Service Centre 1 North Buona Vista Drive, MOE Building, Podium Block, Singapore 138675

Scheme last updated 27 Feb 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
